verse.verse_0: In the name of Allah, the Most Gracious, the Most Merciful.
verse.verse_2: There is, at its occurrence, no denial.
verse.verse_3: It will bring down [some] and raise up [others].
verse.verse_4: When the earth is shaken with convulsion
verse.verse_5: And the mountains are broken down, crumbling
verse.verse_8: Then the companions of the right - what are the companions of the right?
verse.verse_9: And the companions of the left - what are the companions of the left?
verse.verse_11: Those are the ones brought near [to Allah]
verse.verse_13: A [large] company of the former peoples
verse.verse_14: And a few of the later peoples,
verse.verse_16: Reclining on them, facing each other.
verse.verse_17: There will circulate among them young boys made eternal
verse.verse_18: With vessels, pitchers and a cup [of wine] from a flowing spring -
verse.verse_19: No headache will they have therefrom, nor will they be intoxicated -
verse.verse_20: And fruit of what they select
verse.verse_21: And the meat of fowl, from whatever they desire.
verse.verse_22: And [for them are] fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes,
verse.verse_24: As reward for what they used to do.
verse.verse_25: They will not hear therein ill speech or commission of sin -
verse.verse_27: The companions of the right - what are the companions of the right?
verse.verse_28: [They will be] among lote trees with thorns removed
verse.verse_35: Indeed, We have produced the women of Paradise in a [new] creation
verse.verse_37: Devoted [to their husbands] and of equal age,
verse.verse_38: For the companions of the right [who are]
verse.verse_39: A company of the former peoples
verse.verse_40: And a company of the later peoples.
verse.verse_41: And the companions of the left - what are the companions of the left?
verse.verse_42: [They will be] in scorching fire and scalding water
verse.verse_43: And a shade of black smoke,
verse.verse_45: Indeed they were, before that, indulging in affluence,
verse.verse_46: And they used to persist in the great violation,
verse.verse_47: And they used to say, "When we die and become dust and bones, are we indeed to be resurrected?
verse.verse_49: Say, [O Muhammad], "Indeed, the former and the later peoples
verse.verse_50: Are to be gathered together for the appointment of a known Day."
verse.verse_51: Then indeed you, O those astray [who are] deniers,
verse.verse_52: Will be eating from trees of zaqqum
verse.verse_53: And filling with it your bellies
verse.verse_54: And drinking on top of it from scalding water
verse.verse_55: And will drink as the drinking of thirsty camels.
verse.verse_56: That is their accommodation on the Day of Recompense.
verse.verse_57: We have created you, so why do you not believe?
verse.verse_58: Have you seen that which you emit?
verse.verse_59: Is it you who creates it, or are We the Creator?
verse.verse_60: We have decreed death among you, and We are not to be outdone
verse.verse_61: In that We will change your likenesses and produce you in that [form] which you do not know.
verse.verse_62: And you have already known the first creation, so will you not remember?
verse.verse_63: And have you seen that [seed] which you sow?
verse.verse_64: Is it you who makes it grow, or are We the grower?
verse.verse_65: If We willed, We could make it [dry] debris, and you would remain in wonder,
verse.verse_68: And have you seen the water that you drink?
verse.verse_69: Is it you who brought it down from the clouds, or is it We who bring it down?
verse.verse_70: If We willed, We could make it bitter, so why are you not grateful?
verse.verse_71: And have you seen the fire that you ignite?
verse.verse_72: Is it you who produced its tree, or are We the producer?
verse.verse_73: We have made it a reminder and provision for the travelers,
verse.verse_74: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.
verse.verse_75: Then I swear by the setting of the stars,
verse.verse_76: And indeed, it is an oath - if you could know - [most] great.
verse.verse_77: Indeed, it is a noble Qur'an
verse.verse_79: None touch it except the purified.
verse.verse_80: [It is] a revelation from the Lord of the worlds.
verse.verse_81: Then is it to this statement that you are indifferent
verse.verse_82: And make [the thanks for] your provision that you deny [the Provider]?
verse.verse_83: Then why, when the soul at death reaches the throat
verse.verse_84: And you are at that time looking on -
verse.verse_85: And Our angels are nearer to him than you, but you do not see -
verse.verse_86: Then why do you not, if you are not to be recompensed,
verse.verse_87: Bring it back, if you should be truthful?
verse.verse_88: And if the deceased was of those brought near to Allah,
verse.verse_89: Then [for him is] rest and bounty and a garden of pleasure.
verse.verse_90: And if he was of the companions of the right,
verse.verse_91: Then [the angels will say], "Peace for you; [you are] from the companions of the right."
verse.verse_92: But if he was of the deniers [who were] astray,
verse.verse_93: Then [for him is] accommodation of scalding water
verse.verse_95: Indeed, this is the true certainty,
verse.verse_96: So exalt the name of your Lord, the Most Great.
